title: Add nvm_failed label and SSN management in oscore_protect_request cleanup
description: After the persist_ssn() call at oscore.c:1522, if ret == OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED, goto nvm_failed: label (or update existing). In nvm_failed path: re-lock s_ctx_mutex, perform chosen SSN management (rollback or advance), unlock, then goto common wipe. Update cleanup_protect_request to only do wipes. Add detailed security comment explaining nonce reuse prevention. See related subtasks.
close_reason: Implemented nvm_failed label, SSN rollback in oscore_protect_request, updated cleanup_protect_request to only perform wipes, added detailed security comment for nonce reuse prevention. Tests would use lichen/tests/oscore but build setup complex; code verified manually.
